nasb.text: Let our leaders represent the whole assembly and let all those in our cities who have married foreign wives come at appointed times, together with the elders and judges of each city, until the fierce anger of our God on account of this matter is turned away from us.”

esv.text: Let our officials stand for the whole assembly. Let all in our cities who have taken foreign wives come at appointed times, and with them the elders and judges of every city, until the fierce wrath of our God over this matter is turned away from us.”

cnv.text: 讓我們的領袖代表全體會眾站在耶和華面前，所有在我們的城中娶了外族女子為妻的人，也都要在指定的日期，與本城的長老和審判官一起來，解決了這事，好使　神因這事所發的烈怒離開我們。”

ccb.text: 不如让我们的首领为全体会众处理这事，让那些娶了外族女子为妻的人在指定的时间与本城的长老和审判官一起来找首领解决，直到我们的上帝因这事而发的烈怒离开我们。”
